2026-03-29.title: Evaluating Prompt Injection Defenses for Educational LLM Tutors: Security-Usability-Latency Trade-offs
2026-03-29.abstract: Educational LLM tutors face a core AI alignment challenge: they must follow user intent while preserving pedagogical constraints and safety policies. We present an evaluation methodology for prompt-injection defenses in this setting, showing that guardrail design entails explicit trade-offs among adversarial robustness, benign-task usability, and response latency. We evaluate a domain-specific multi-layer safeguard pipeline combining deterministic pattern filters, structural validation, contextual sandboxing, and session-level behavioral checks. On a controlled holdout benchmark with 480 queries (369 injection, 111 benign), the pipeline reaches 46.34% bypass, 0.00% false positive rate, and 2.50 ms average latency -- an operating point that prioritizes pedagogical usability (zero false positives) while maintaining measurable attack resistance. We provide a reproducible benchmark protocol for head-to-head comparison under identical conditions, including stratified bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar significance tests, and direct evaluation of Prompt Guard and NeMo Guardrails on the same split with unified instrumentation. Results expose operational trade-offs: NeMo reaches 0% bypass at 16.22% FPR and 1.3s latency, while Prompt Guard yields 38.48% bypass with 3.60% FPR. The framework supports evidence-based guardrail selection for AI tutoring systems under different institutional risk and usability requirements.

analysis.tldr: 针对教育LLM导师的提示注入防御评估，揭示安全性、可用性与延迟之间的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育LLM导师面临核心对齐挑战：需同时遵循用户意图并保持教学约束与安全策略，现有防御方法缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何评估提示注入防御在教育场景中的对抗鲁棒性、良性任务可用性与响应延迟之间的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要显示不同防御方法存在明确权衡：多层管道实现零误报但46.34%绕过率；NeMo Guardrails零绕过但16.22%误报率与1.3秒延迟；Prompt Guard 38.48%绕过与3.60%误报率。
analysis.method: 提出评估方法论，构建领域特定多层安全管道（确定性模式过滤、结构验证、上下文沙箱、会话级行为检查），并设计可复现基准协议（分层bootstrap置信区间、配对McNemar显著性检验）。
contributions: 提出教育LLM导师场景下提示注入防御的评估方法论，明确安全-可用性-延迟权衡。
构建多层安全管道并开源基准协议，支持公平对比不同防御方法。
analysis.experiments: 在480个查询（369注入，111良性）的基准上评估，多层管道绕过率46.34%，误报率0.00%，平均延迟2.50ms；NeMo Guardrails绕过率0%，误报率16.22%，延迟1.3s；Prompt Guard绕过率38.48%，误报率3.60%。
limitations: 基准规模较小（480查询），可能无法覆盖真实场景多样性。
仅评估三种防御方法，未涵盖其他最新防御技术。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对教育LLM导师的提示注入防御评估，揭示安全性、可用性与延迟之间的权衡。

2026-03-04.title: Constraint-Aware Execution Planning for Hybrid Space-Ground Compute Workloads
2026-03-04.abstract: Low Earth orbit (LEO) satellites increasingly carry compute hardware capable of on-board processing, yet each satellite generates roughly two orders of magnitude more data than it can downlink per orbit. This mismatch forces operators to decide, for every workload, which computation runs on-board and which runs on the ground, how intermediate data crosses the space-ground boundary through narrow contact windows, and how to maintain delivery guarantees over noisy channels. We present Constraint-Aware Execution (CAE), a planning system that takes a satellite identifier, a workload expressed as a directed acyclic graph of processing steps, and a set of orbital and resource constraints, and produces a deterministic, physically grounded execution plan. CAE operates in four phases: (1) orbital environment construction via SGP4 propagation with eclipse detection and ground station pass prediction, (2) compute placement using a cost model that compares on-board resource consumption against transfer overhead, (3) transfer insertion with adaptive forward error correction and security overhead modeling, and (4) greedy first-fit scheduling into orbital windows under power, thermal, compute, and communication constraints. We evaluate CAE against five representative workload patterns across satellites in distinct orbital regimes and demonstrate that the system produces feasible plans in under two seconds, correctly exploits onboard data reduction to minimize transfer volume, and adapts FEC and multi-pass allocation to varying channel conditions. CAE is deployed as a production API computing plans for any cataloged satellite using live two-line element data.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种约束感知执行规划系统CAE，用于混合星地计算工作负载的物理可行执行计划生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 低轨卫星产生的数据量远超其下行链路容量，需要高效决策哪些计算在星上执行、哪些在地面执行，以及如何通过窄接触窗口传输中间数据，同时保证在噪声信道上的交付质量。
analysis.problem: 如何为混合星地计算工作负载生成确定性的、物理可行的执行计划，包括计算放置、传输插入和调度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CAE系统包含四个阶段：轨道环境构建（SGP4传播、日食检测、地面站过境预测）、计算放置（成本模型比较星上资源消耗与传输开销）、传输插入（自适应前向纠错和安全开销建模）、贪心首次适应调度（在功率、热、计算和通信约束下）。
contributions: 提出CAE规划系统，为混合星地计算工作负载生成物理可行的执行计划。
在多种卫星轨道和工作负载模式下，系统能在两秒内生成可行计划，并正确利用星上数据缩减最小化传输量。
analysis.experiments: 在五种代表性工作负载模式上评估，覆盖不同轨道卫星，系统在2秒内生成可行计划，正确利用星上数据缩减，并自适应调整FEC和多通道分配。
limitations: 可能未考虑卫星间协作或星座级调度。
贪心调度可能不是全局最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种约束感知执行规划系统CAE，用于混合星地计算工作负载的物理可行执行计划生成。
